# AI-search answer page

## When to use

Use when buyers ask AI/search for recommendations.

## Why it works

Structured facts improve answerability.

## Mechanism

AI systems need clear, sourceable pages.

## Required inputs

FAQ, comparison, glossary, docs.

## When not to use

If product facts are weak.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Organic impressions, referral mentions, branded search.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
